abilities.description: Distribute three +1/+1 counters among one, two, or three target creatures. For each +1/+1 counter you put on a creature this way, remove a +1/+1 counter from that creature at the beginning of the next cleanup step.
abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature to distribute counters to

statics.description: You may exile a green card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
